name: textverktyg
description: Tool for processing text with GenAI

scripts.build: NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:-production} pnpm exec tsc && node build.mjs
scripts.build:local: NODE_ENV=development pnpm exec tsc && node build.mjs
scripts.build:local:win: set NODE_ENV=development&& pnpm exec tsc && node build.mjs
scripts.benchmark:summarize:stress: SUMMARIZE_TOTAL_REQUESTS=120 SUMMARIZE_CONCURRENCY=50 SUMMARIZE_IP_POOL_SIZE=50 SUMMARIZE_RETRY_ON_BUSY=true SUMMARIZE_MAX_BUSY_RETRIES=2 LOAD_GATE_MIN_SUCCESS_RATE=0.99 LOAD_GATE_MAX_BUSY_RATE=0.05 LOAD_GATE_MAX_P95_MS=45000 LOAD_GATE_MAX_P99_MS=60000 LOAD_GATE_MIN_AVG_QUALITY=0 node scripts/summarize-load-gate.mjs
scripts.test: set -a && . ./.env && set +a && DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} pnpm exec prisma generate && DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm exec tsc && DATABASE_URL=${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} node --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/tests
scripts.test:nodb: pnpm exec tsc && DATABASE_URL= node --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/tests
